name: Rich Chocolate Cake--Taste of Home Version
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine the oil, cocoa powder, and sugar. Beat on low speed until well mixed.
2. Add the eggs; beat on medium speed until well blended.
3. Gradually add the salt, buttermilk, flour, and vanilla extract to the mixture. Mix on low speed until combined.
4. In a separate bowl, dissolve baking soda in hot water.
5. Gradually mix the dissolved baking soda into the cake batter until just combined. The batter will be very thin before baking.
6. Grease and flour a 13x9 inch baking pan or two layer pans.
7. Bake at 375°F for 40 minutes.
8. Test with a toothpick in the center of the cake to ensure it is done.
9. Frost with Chocolate Fudge Frosting, if desired.
